title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾（🦞）为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个基于智能体技能的框架和软件开发方法论，强调实用性和有效性。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、直觉、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
The agent harness performance optimization system

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以便用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随着用户成长而发展的智能代理项目，托管在 GitHub 上。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个流行的 Stable Diffusion 模型网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑和扩展功能。
highlights: Stable Diffusion web UI
AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让用户分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: YouTube to automatically label AI-generated videos
summary: YouTube宣布将自动为AI生成的视频添加标签，以帮助观众识别内容来源，并提升平台透明度。
highlights: YouTube to automatically label AI-generated videos
improving AI labels for viewers and creators

title: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
content: Article URL: https://www.pcgamer.com/hardware/duckduckgos-ai-free-search-saw-nearly-28-percent-more-visits-in-the-week-following-googles-insistence-that-people-love-ai-mode/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48296649 Points: 896 # Comments: 433
summary: DuckDuckGo 在谷歌宣称用户喜爱AI模式后的一周内，访问量增长了近28%，反映出用户对无AI搜索的偏好。
highlights: DuckDuckGo search saw 28% more visits after Google said people love AI mode
nearly 28 percent more visits in the week following Google's insistence that people love AI mode

title: ax, Google’s new highly distributed agent executor
summary: Ax是Google新推出的高度分布式代理执行器，相关讨论链接已提供。
highlights: Ax, Google’s new highly distributed agent executor

title: YT labels slop via ML
content: <p>"While we still require creators to manually disclose when they use realistic AI, [...] but our systems detect significant photorealistic AI use, we will now automatically apply a label."</p> <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/k2jg2y/yt_labels_slop_via_ml">Comments</a></p>
summary: YouTube 宣布将通过机器学习系统自动检测并标记显著的照片级AI生成内容，同时仍要求创作者手动披露AI使用情况。
highlights: While we still require creators to manually disclose when they use realistic AI
our systems detect significant photorealistic AI use, we will now automatically apply a label

title: Cisco and OpenAI redefine enterprise engineering with Codex
content: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex, helping Cisco scale AI-native development, accelerate AI Defense work, and automate defect remediation.
summary: Cisco与OpenAI合作，通过Codex重新定义企业工程，助力Cisco扩展AI原生开发、加速AI防御工作并自动化缺陷修复。
highlights: Cisco and OpenAI are redefining enterprise engineering with Codex
helping Cisco scale AI-native development
accelerate AI Defense work
automate defect remediation

title: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
content: See how OpenAI, Thrive, and Crete built a self-improving tax agent with Codex, automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows.
summary: 本文介绍了OpenAI、Thrive和Crete如何利用Codex构建自我改进的税务代理，实现自动化申报、提高准确性和加速工作流程。
highlights: Building self-improving tax agents with Codex
automating filings, improving accuracy, and accelerating workflows

title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
summary: ITBench-AA 是首个针对企业IT任务的代理基准测试，结果显示前沿模型得分低于50%，由Artificial Analysis和IBM共同发布。
highlights: ITBench-AA 是首个针对企业IT任务的代理基准测试
前沿模型得分低于50%
由Artificial Analysis和IBM共同发布

title: Reachy Mini goes fully local
summary: Reachy Mini 实现完全本地化运行，无需依赖云端服务，提升了隐私性和响应速度。
highlights: Reachy Mini goes fully local
无需依赖云端服务
提升隐私性和响应速度
